blocks.markdown: 15. **Prior Year** – Vacancy Rate must consider full previous year’s scheduled and booked data without affecting current year metrics. Example: 90,000 scheduled, 60,000 booked → Vacancy Rate = **33.3%**. #Manual <roam uid="AL12jaUH-"/>
blocks.text: 15. **Prior Year** – Vacancy Rate must consider full previous year’s scheduled and booked data without affecting current year metrics. Example: 90,000 scheduled, 60,000 booked → Vacancy Rate = **33.3%**. #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) - (Management Overview Cards) <roam uid="z3Oe8w-E8"/>
blocks.markdown: 14. **Today** – Vacancy Rate must reflect only the current day’s scheduled and booked time. Example: 480 scheduled, 360 booked → Vacancy Rate = **25%**. #Manual <roam uid="bjDhtk28Y"/>
blocks.text: 14. **Today** – Vacancy Rate must reflect only the current day’s scheduled and booked time. Example: 480 scheduled, 360 booked → Vacancy Rate = **25%**. #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) - (Management Overview Cards) <roam uid="z3Oe8w-E8"/>
blocks.markdown: 13. **Last Month** – Vacancy Rate must include only schedule and booked time between the 1st and last date of previous month. Example: 8,000 scheduled, 6,400 booked → (1,600 ÷ 8,000) × 100 = **20%**. #Manual <roam uid="PuLzy4Vq8"/>
blocks.text: 13. **Last Month** – Vacancy Rate must include only schedule and booked time between the 1st and last date of previous month. Example: 8,000 scheduled, 6,400 booked → (1,600 ÷ 8,000) × 100 = **20%**. #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) - (Management Overview Cards) <roam uid="z3Oe8w-E8"/>
blocks.markdown: 12. **YTD (default)** – Vacancy Rate must calculate based on all provider schedules from Jan 1 to today. #Manual <roam uid="_D9H5z23i"/>
blocks.text: 12. **YTD (default)** – Vacancy Rate must calculate based on all provider schedules from Jan 1 to today. #Manual

blocks.markdown: 13. **When a service belongs to a Performance Record (Configuration 2),** the Average Visits per Case must be based on completed sessions  (e.g., Case 1 - 6 sessions, Case 2 - 8 sessions ⇒ (6+8)/2 = 7.0). #Manual <roam uid="WsQxeFuam"/>

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) -(Performance Overview Cards) <roam uid="O5UdDe27v"/>
blocks.markdown: 12. **When I change the date filter (e.g., from YTD to Last Month),** only cases discharged in that date range must be counted, while visits before the discharge are still included. (e.g., Case discharged on Sep 28 with 6 total visits ⇒ all 6 counted even if 4 were before Sep). #Manual <roam uid="AYcAR2yDc"/>

blocks.markdown: 10. **When a case is discharged within the selected date range but has some completed appointments before the range,** all visits must still be included in the numerator since they belong to the same course of care (e.g., Case 1 discharged in Oct: 2 visits in Sep, 3 in Oct ⇒ total 5 counted). #Manual <roam uid="qNCYqmxEL"/>
blocks.text: 10. **When a case is discharged within the selected date range but has some completed appointments before the range,** all visits must still be included in the numerator since they belong to the same course of care (e.g., Case 1 discharged in Oct: 2 visits in Sep, 3 in Oct ⇒ total 5 counted). #Manual

blocks.markdown: 9. **When I apply all filters together (Facility = Downtown Clinic, Provider = Dr. Smith, Service = Knee Rehabilitation),** the Average Visits per Case must include only cases satisfying all filters (e.g., Case 1 - 3 visits, Case 2 - 5 visits ⇒ (3+5)/2 = 4.0). #Manual <roam uid="h6PxG8-Do"/>
blocks.text: 9. **When I apply all filters together (Facility = Downtown Clinic, Provider = Dr. Smith, Service = Knee Rehabilitation),** the Average Visits per Case must include only cases satisfying all filters (e.g., Case 1 - 3 visits, Case 2 - 5 visits ⇒ (3+5)/2 = 4.0). #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) -(Performance Overview Cards) <roam uid="O5UdDe27v"/>
blocks.markdown: 8. **When I apply a Provider and Service filter together (e.g., Provider = Dr. Smith, Service = Knee Rehabilitation),** the Average Visits per Case must include only discharged cases of that provider for that service (e.g., Case X - 4 visits, Case Y - 6 visits ⇒ (4+6)/2 = 5.0). #Manual <roam uid="pKZraIQG6"/>
blocks.text: 8. **When I apply a Provider and Service filter together (e.g., Provider = Dr. Smith, Service = Knee Rehabilitation),** the Average Visits per Case must include only discharged cases of that provider for that service (e.g., Case X - 4 visits, Case Y - 6 visits ⇒ (4+6)/2 = 5.0). #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) -(Performance Overview Cards) <roam uid="O5UdDe27v"/>
blocks.markdown: 7. **When I apply a Facility and Service Category filter together (e.g., Facility = Downtown Clinic, Category = Physiotherapy),** the Average Visits per Case must include only discharged cases from that facility under that category (e.g., Case 1 - 5 visits, Case 2 - 7 visits ⇒ (5+7)/2 = 6.0). #Manual <roam uid="f0C0yDFop"/>
blocks.text: 7. **When I apply a Facility and Service Category filter together (e.g., Facility = Downtown Clinic, Category = Physiotherapy),** the Average Visits per Case must include only discharged cases from that facility under that category (e.g., Case 1 - 5 visits, Case 2 - 7 visits ⇒ (5+7)/2 = 6.0). #Manual

path: Appointment Analytics (Provider Metrics) -(Performance Overview Cards) <roam uid="O5UdDe27v"/>
blocks.markdown: 6. **When I apply a Facility and Provider filter together (e.g., Facility = Downtown Clinic, Provider = Dr. Smith),** the Average Visits per Case must calculate only for discharged cases under that provider in that facility (e.g., Case A - 3 visits, Case B - 6 visits ⇒ (3+6)/2 = 4.5). #Manual <roam uid="HEZ7eMTnA"/>
blocks.text: 6. **When I apply a Facility and Provider filter together (e.g., Facility = Downtown Clinic, Provider = Dr. Smith),** the Average Visits per Case must calculate only for discharged cases under that provider in that facility (e.g., Case A - 3 visits, Case B - 6 visits ⇒ (3+6)/2 = 4.5). #Manual

blocks.markdown: 14. If the waiver form is not displayed under the "Other" section despite enabling it in the Admin Portal, the system must log an error, and an appropriate message must be displayed to the user (e.g., "Waiver form could not be loaded.").#Manual#Automated <roam uid="Sx3rdacas"/>
blocks.text: 14. If the waiver form is not displayed under the "Other" section despite enabling it in the Admin Portal, the system must log an error, and an appropriate message must be displayed to the user (e.g., "Waiver form could not be loaded.").#Manual#Automated

blocks.markdown: 13. If the system fails to load the "Waiver and Release Control" field in the Admin Portal, an appropriate error message (e.g., "Failed to load settings. Please try again later.") must be displayed.#Manual#Automated <roam uid="MCNXdnGqB"/>
blocks.text: 13. If the system fails to load the "Waiver and Release Control" field in the Admin Portal, an appropriate error message (e.g., "Failed to load settings. Please try again later.") must be displayed.#Manual#Automated

blocks.text: 12. If the user tries to enable or disable the waiver without confirming the pop-up, no changes must be made to the waiver's state.#Manual#Automated
